title: An Act to Encourage New Residential Housing Through a Tax Exemption for the Sale or Rental of Such Housing
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, May 28, 2025
last_house_action: 5/6/2025 - Committee on Taxation suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 5/28/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
